scores.metric: sandbox --disable all (masked Levenshtein); all cheats stripped
scores.note: Floor is 12 regardless of s1/s2/s3 declaration order; masked scorer normalizes register names so save-order differences don't count. All 12 diffs from +8-byte frame-size delta (vars=8 natural vs vars=16 target).

sessions.lever: stripped register asm(a3/a1) pins + dummy0/dummy1 "m" frame cheat + regfix reorder; clean body byte-identical except a single +8-byte frame-size delta. No recoverable semantic local for the unused 16-byte (target) vs 8-byte (ours) sp local hole.

Confirmed frame mechanism: GCC 2.7.2 cc1 naturally gives vars=8 for this function body. Dead-array test: `{ s32 tmp[2]; }` (no stores, nested block at end) gives vars=16/frame=56 with NO extra body stores — correct save offsets — but FORBIDDEN by dead-vars-local-array (engine detector refuses completion). Declaration-order reversal (s3,s2,s1) gives correct save order but FAILS cheat-reviewer (param-local-alias-prologue-pair-flip family). Floor unchanged at 12.

reviewer.verdict: FAIL (for candidate with s3,s2,s1 order) / N/A for s1,s2,s3 order (no cheats, not submitted for COMPLETED-C)
reviewer.evidence: Cheat-reviewer FAILed the s3,s2,s1 declaration-order reversal as prologue-save-order manipulation (param-local-alias-prologue-pair-flip family). Saved under rejected/decl-order-prologue-flip.c. Current candidate.c uses logical s1,s2,s3 order — pure C, no cheats, honest distance 12.

remaining_gap.summary: 12 diffs = 1 addiu-sp prologue + 5 sw saves at wrong offsets + 5 lw restores at wrong offsets + 1 addiu-sp epilogue. Frame -48 (ours) vs -56 (target). Target's vars area (sp+16..sp+31 = 16 bytes) is NEVER accessed in body — a phantom local fully DCE'd.
remaining_gap.key_finding_2026-06-21: Dead array `{ s32 tmp[2]; }` in nested scope (no stores) IS the mechanism that gives vars=16 without extra body asm. Gives correct frame, correct save offsets, no register shift. FORBIDDEN by dead-vars-local-array policy.
remaining_gap.cheat_at_head: register asm(a3)=i, asm(a1)=mask pins + dummy0/dummy1 with __asm__("" :: "m"(dummy0),"m"(dummy1)) frame-coercion + reorder rule. prologue_config.json entry also present (hardcoded -56 frame).
remaining_gap.rules_required_for_full_match: A phantom 16-byte local (vars=16). No semantic local recoverable from the body. Dead-array approaches are forbidden. Phantom dummy/pad arrays are forbidden.

next_hypotheses: No remaining pure-C levers. All frame-coercion mechanisms are FORBIDDEN. Function is in same class as func_8001924C.
If no semantic local is recoverable, canonical-asm / park (unrecoverable phantom frame local). Surface for user authorization.
